name: ai-herway-founder-command-centre
description: The AI Her Way Founder Command Centre — a starter set of agentic staff members for founders, built to run inside Claude. Six skills: a Board of Advisors that pressure-tests your decisions, a Chief of Staff that runs your daily brief, a Content Engine, a Carousel Creator that turns one idea into a finished on-brand Instagram carousel, a Meeting Prep & Follow-up assistant, and an Inbox Triage assistant. Built for the Women's AI Boardroom Retreat with Nikki Fogden-Moore.

author.name: Dr Nici Sweaney — AI Her Way
